title: Web Developer
description:
**About The Company**
 Allied Container Group is a prominent logistics and supply chain management company headquartered in Singapore, with a strong presence across the Asia\\-Pacific (APAC) and Europe, Middle East, and Africa (EMEA) regions. With nearly five decades of industry experience, we specialize in delivering comprehensive logistics solutions that cater to diverse business needs. Our services include trucking, container haulage, depot yard operations, warehousing, distribution, and freight forwarding, serving clients of all sizes from small enterprises to large corporations. Our commitment to innovation is reflected in our dedicated in\\-house technology team, which leverages cutting\\-edge technology and artificial intelligence to enhance operational efficiency and develop innovative software and hardware solutions that streamline logistics processes and improve service delivery.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a skilled Web Developer to join our Technology \\& Operations team. In this role, you will be instrumental in developing and maintaining advanced web applications that support our core business functions. Your work will involve creating new features, automating processes, and ensuring the robustness and performance of enterprise web solutions. You will collaborate closely with UI/UX designers, project managers, and operational teams to deliver seamless digital experiences that enhance our logistics operations. This position offers an exciting opportunity to work on innovative projects within a dynamic environment, contributing to the digital transformation of a leading logistics provider. The role is initially based remotely from India, with potential relocation to Dubai or Oman after the probation period, depending on performance and business needs.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate will possess a minimum of two years of hands\\-on full\\-stack development experience, with proficiency in React, Laravel, React Native, HTML, CSS, and related JavaScript/PHP frameworks. A solid understanding of databases, version control tools such as Git or SVN, and web server management (e.g., Apache, Nginx) is essential. A degree in Computer Science or a related field is preferred, or equivalent professional experience demonstrating relevant skills. Familiarity with OCR frameworks, CI/CD pipelines, cloud services like AWS, Azure, or DigitalOcean, and system testing methodologies will be advantageous. Candidates should demonstrate strong problem\\-solving skills, the ability to work independently and collaboratively, and an interest in automation, artificial intelligence, and innovative research. Flexibility to relocate to the Middle East after the initial period is also desirable, along with the ability to adapt to regional working environments and collaborate effectively with onsite teams.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Develop, automate, and maintain web applications and services that align with business and operational objectives, ensuring adherence to performance standards and quality coding practices.
* Collaborate with team leads and colleagues to gather requirements, define project scope, and ensure timely delivery of features and solutions.
* Work closely with UI/UX teams to ensure consistency in design and user experience across web applications.
* Document product specifications, project progress, and technical details to facilitate knowledge sharing and future development.
* Stay informed about emerging trends and technologies in web development to continuously enhance skills and incorporate innovative solutions into projects.
* Coordinate with yard staff, operations, and accounts teams to understand workflow requirements and integrate web solutions accordingly.
* Participate in system testing, automate testing processes where applicable, and troubleshoot issues to ensure high\\-quality deliverables.


**Benefits**
 Allied Container Group offers a competitive compensation package, including salary, performance incentives, and benefits aligned with industry standards. Employees gain the opportunity to work within a forward\\-thinking organization that values innovation and professional growth. We provide a collaborative work environment, opportunities for skill development, and exposure to cutting\\-edge technologies in logistics and supply chain management. Additionally, the role offers potential international relocation opportunities, allowing employees to experience working in diverse cultural environments within the Middle East. We also support work\\-life balance initiatives and provide a comprehensive benefits package that includes health insurance, paid leave, and professional development allowances.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Allied Container Group is an equal opportunity employer committed to fostering an inclusive environment for all employees. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, gender, age, nationality, or disability. We believe that diversity enhances our ability to innovate and serve our clients effectively. We welcome applications from candidates of all backgrounds and are dedicated to providing equal employment opportunities to ensure a fair and equitable workplace.

title: Software Engineer – automotive infotainment/telematics
description:
**Company Description** 




 Three Meadows Software Private Limited, the India development center for a group of European product companies, specializes in end\\-to\\-end development in multimedia, entertainment, IoT, and automotive solutions. With deep expertise, the team has successfully delivered comprehensive solutions to Tier 1 broadcasters, operators, SoCs, and OEMs on platforms like RTOS, Linux, and AndroidTV. Leveraging innovative approaches, the company is shaping cutting\\-edge products for global markets.
 



  






 The Automotive Engineering Services Unit is dedicated to excelling in embedded software development, engaging in a variety of projects. These include development of Infotainment System, Telematics, Smart sensors for autonomous driving, and development of next\\-generation in\\-cabin monitoring systems (monitoring driver fatigue and attention, detecting passenger presence in the cabin, etc.). 
 




  





**Role Description** 




 This is a full\\-time, on\\-site Software Engineer role specializing in automotive infotainment and telematics, located in Bangalore. Work from home is not allowed in this unit.
 



  





**The role involves (but not limited to) \\-** 



* Working on projects within the areas of Automotive Infotainment device and Telematic ECU’s
* Participating in the development of embedded real\\-time software systems based on high\\-end SoCs, microcontrollers and communication interfaces
* Participating in feature design, development (C\\+\\+), integration and testing in the domain of Wi\\-Fi HAL.
* Feature implementation and bug fixing (Java) within the higher layers of Android’s Wi\\-Fi stack
* Verification of functionality on representative car hardware
* Android Compatibility Test Suite (CTS) and Vendor Test Suite (VTS) automatic Wi\\-Fi stack testing (testing, debugging and fixing tests)
* Maintaining close relationships with your Project Manager, customer, and team colleagues
* Sharing and broadening your knowledge and experiences within your team and creating new ideas together



  





  





**Qualifications** 



* Academic education in computer technology (BTech or MTech degree)
* Minimum 2 years of experience in embedded software development in C\\+\\+14 and automotive infotainment/telematics
* Experience in work with communication interfaces
* Senior experience in embedded Linux (kernel and/or user\\-space)
* Basic knowledge of Android Open\\-Source Project (AOSP) and Java
* Understanding of ASPICE software development processes
* Ability to work collaboratively in team\\-oriented environments
* Excellent in communication skills

title: Data Scientist
description:
**About The Company**
 Based in San Francisco, California, Turing is the world’s leading research accelerator for frontier AI labs and a trusted partner for global enterprises deploying advanced AI systems. Turing supports its customers through two primary avenues: first, by accelerating frontier research with high\\-quality data, sophisticated training pipelines, and top\\-tier AI researchers who specialize in coding, reasoning, STEM, multilinguality, multimodality, and agents; and second, by applying this expertise to help enterprises transform AI from proof of concept into proprietary intelligence. The company’s systems are designed to perform reliably, deliver measurable impact, and generate lasting results on the profit and loss statements of its clients.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking experienced Software Engineers (SWE Bench – Data Engineer / Data Science) to join our team and contribute to benchmark\\-driven evaluation projects. This role focuses on real\\-world data engineering and data science workflows, involving hands\\-on work with production\\-like datasets, data pipelines, and evaluation tasks. The successful candidate will work closely with research and engineering teams to develop, validate, and optimize data workflows that support the performance assessment of advanced AI systems. This position offers a unique opportunity to work on challenging data projects, utilize cutting\\-edge tools, and contribute to the development of AI evaluation frameworks that influence the future of AI research and deployment.
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Minimum of 3\\+ years of experience as a Data Engineer, Data Scientist, or Software Engineer with a focus on data workflows.
* Strong proficiency in Python, with extensive experience in data engineering and data science tasks.
* Proven experience with data processing, analysis, and model\\-related workflows in real\\-world environments.
* Solid understanding of machine learning fundamentals and data science principles.
* Experience working with both structured and unstructured data sources.
* Ability to navigate, understand, and modify complex, real\\-world codebases effectively.
* Demonstrated capability to write readable, reusable, and well\\-documented code.
* Excellent problem\\-solving skills, particularly with algorithmic and data\\-intensive challenges.
* Strong communication skills in spoken and written English, capable of articulating complex technical concepts clearly.


**Responsibilities**
* Work with structured and unstructured datasets to support evaluation tasks in a benchmark\\-driven environment.
* Design, build, and validate data pipelines used in benchmarking and evaluation workflows to ensure data quality and reproducibility.
* Perform data processing, analysis, feature engineering, and validation for various data science applications.
* Write, run, and modify Python scripts to process data, support experiments, and automate workflows locally.
* Assess data quality, transformations, and outputs to maintain high standards of accuracy and consistency.
* Create clean, well\\-documented, and reusable data workflows suitable for benchmarking purposes.
* Participate in code reviews to uphold high standards of code quality, maintainability, and efficiency.
* Collaborate with researchers and engineers to design challenging, real\\-world data engineering and data science tasks for AI systems evaluation.


**Benefits**
 Joining Turing as a freelance Software Engineer offers the flexibility of working in a fully remote environment, allowing you to balance your professional and personal life effectively. You will have the opportunity to work on cutting\\-edge AI projects with leading language model companies and innovative AI labs. The engagement provides exposure to the latest advancements in AI research and development, enhancing your skills and industry knowledge. Additionally, Turing offers a supportive community of professionals and the chance to expand your network within the AI and data science ecosystem. The flexible nature of the contract allows for a manageable workload, making it ideal for professionals seeking project\\-based work or supplementary income.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Turing is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees and contractors. We do not discriminate based on race, ethnicity, gender, age, religion, sexual orientation, disability, or any other protected characteristic. We believe that diverse perspectives and backgrounds foster innovation and excellence, and we welcome applicants from all walks of life to join our team and contribute to our mission of advancing AI research and deployment.

title: Development Engineer 2
description:

title: Senior Staff Engineer
description:
**About The Role**
 The Data Platform team is part of the Platform org which is based in Bangalore and is responsible for building Uber's Data Lake for the rest of the company. Team owns end to end charters for multiple batch data areas around storage (HDFS and Cloud Storage), Analytics (Hive, Spark), Pipeline Orchestration and Authoring, Data Quality, Metadata and Lineage, Jupyter Notebooks, Data LifeCycle Management, and Data Engineering. Team drives multiple global efforts around cloud migration and disaster recovery.
   

  

 We have an eclectic team with a diverse set of backgrounds from companies such as Facebook, Google, Cloudera, Amazon, Microsoft, LinkedIn, Twitter, other startups and college grads from the top schools. The team is proud to be a part of the open source community in innovating and shaping such exciting technologies as we move forward. Uber, as a business, is also growing rapidly, and Data at Uber is at the heart of almost all products e.g. Pricing predictions, Uber Pool route optimizations, Uber Eats restaurant recommendations, fraud detection, storage and processing of data collected from Autonomous vehicles etc.
   

  

 By solving these business problems you will not only be helping Uber but also have a front row seat to build and innovate the future Big Data systems and contribute them back to open source. This is an exciting time to be part of the Data team at Uber. Be sure to check out our engineering blog to learn more about the team.
   

  

**What The Candidate Will Need / Bonus Points**
 \\-\\-\\-\\- What the Candidate Will Do \\-\\-\\-\\-
   

  

 Design systems architecture and deliver software and tools to advance the reliability of infrastructure including availability, performance, efficiency and scaling.
   

  

 Provide technical leadership, influence and partner with fellow engineers to architect, design and build infrastructure that can stand the test of scale and availability, while reducing operational overhead.
   

  

 Drive efficiencies in systems and processes through automation: capacity planning, configuration management, performance tuning, monitoring and root cause analysis.
   

  

 Collaborate with platform, product and security engineering teams, and enable successful use of infrastructure and foundational services, and manage upstream and downstream dependencies
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree (or higher) in Computer Science or related field.
* 12\\+ years experience building large scale distributed software systems.
* Solid understanding of Java for backend / systems software development.


**Preferred Qualifications**
 Prior experience with big data systems \\- Spark, Hive, HUDI, Iceberg, Presto, Flink, Pinot, HDFS, YARN, etc preferred.

title: Lead Software Engineer - Java, AWS
description:
**Job Description**
 We have an opportunity to impact your career and provide an adventure where you can push the limits of what's possible.
   

  

 As a Lead Software Engineer at JPMorganChase within Payments team, you are an integral part of an agile team that works to enhance, build, and deliver trusted market\\-leading technology products in a secure, stable, and scalable way. As a core technical contributor, you are responsible for conducting critical technology solutions across multiple technical areas within various business functions in support of the firm’s business objectives.
   

  

**Job Responsibilities**
* Executes creative software solutions, design, development, and deploy cloud\\-native applications using AWS services (EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS, DynamoDB, ECS, EKS, etc.).
* Automate infrastructure provisioning and application deployment using AWS tools (CloudFormation, Terraform, AWS CDK).
* Develops secure high\\-quality production code, and reviews and debugs code written by others
* Identifies opportunities to eliminate or automate remediation of recurring issues to improve overall operational stability of software applications and system.
* Monitor, troubleshoot, and optimize application performance and reliability in the AWS environment.
* Ensure security and compliance by implementing IAM policies, encryption, and monitoring.
* Document technical solutions and provide support for audits and regulatory reviews.
* Leads communities of practice across Software Engineering to drive awareness and use of new and leading\\-edge cloud technologies
* Adds to team culture of diversity, opportunity, inclusion, and respect.


**Required Qualifications, Capabilities, And Skills**

title: Flutter Developer
description:
**About The Company**
 MagnetConnects is a forward\\-thinking technology company dedicated to delivering innovative digital solutions that empower businesses and enhance user experiences. With a focus on mobile app development, we strive to create high\\-quality, scalable, and user\\-friendly applications tailored to meet our clients' unique needs. Our team comprises passionate professionals committed to excellence, continuous learning, and staying ahead of industry trends. At MagnetConnects, we believe in fostering a collaborative environment that encourages creativity, innovation, and professional growth.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a talented Flutter Developer to join our dynamic team. In this role, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining mobile applications for both Android and iOS platforms using Flutter. You will work closely with experienced developers and cross\\-functional teams to deliver high\\-performance, visually appealing, and user\\-centric mobile apps. This position offers an excellent opportunity for individuals with foundational Flutter experience to expand their skill set, learn best practices, and contribute to impactful projects within a supportive environment. The ideal candidate should be passionate about mobile development, eager to innovate, and committed to delivering quality results.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate should possess a Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field, or demonstrate equivalent practical experience. Candidates should have 2 to 3 years of hands\\-on experience in mobile application development with a focus on Flutter and Dart. Strong understanding of API integration, RESTful services, and JSON handling is essential. Familiarity with UI/UX principles, including Material Design for Android and Human Interface Guidelines for iOS, is required to create responsive and consistent interfaces. Experience with version control systems such as Git is necessary for collaborative development. Excellent communication skills and the ability to work effectively within a team are also vital for success in this role.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Develop, test, and deploy mobile applications for Android and iOS platforms using Flutter framework.
* Collaborate with UI/UX designers to implement visually appealing and user\\-friendly interfaces.
* Integrate third\\-party APIs and backend services to enhance app functionality.
* Ensure the performance, quality, and responsiveness of applications through rigorous testing and optimization.
* Publish apps on Google Play Store and Apple App Store, adhering to their respective guidelines and review processes.
* Manage app updates, bug fixes, and version upgrades post\\-deployment to ensure continuous improvement.
* Implement app security best practices to safeguard user data and app integrity.
* Utilize version control systems like Git for effective code management and collaboration.
* Configure build generation processes for APK, AAB, and IPA files.
* Handle app signing, provisioning profiles, and certificates, especially for iOS deployments.
* Integrate push notifications using Firebase Cloud Messaging or Apple Push Notification Service.
* Employ analytics tools such as Firebase Analytics and Crashlytics to monitor app performance and user engagement.
* Optimize app performance and debug issues using appropriate techniques and tools.
* Implement deep linking and app linking to improve navigation and user experience.
* Participate in multi\\-environment setups including development, staging, and production environments.
* Stay updated with industry best practices, emerging trends, and new technologies related to mobile app development.


**Benefits**
 At MagnetConnects, we offer competitive compensation packages aligned with industry standards. Our employees enjoy a collaborative and innovative work environment that fosters professional growth and skill enhancement. We provide opportunities for continuous learning through training sessions, workshops, and industry conferences. Our benefits include health insurance, paid leave, flexible working hours, and a supportive team culture that values diversity and inclusion. Additionally, employees have access to modern tools and resources necessary to excel in their roles, and we encourage a healthy work\\-life balance to promote overall well\\-being.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 MagnetConnects is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, gender, sexual orientation, age, disability, or any other protected characteristic. We believe that a diverse workforce enhances our creativity, innovation, and overall success, and we are dedicated to providing equal employment opportunities to all qualified candidates.
